name: 1.54" ST7789 IPS Module (240x240, SPI, MSP1541)
description: Generic 1.54 inch 240x240 IPS TFT module (ST7789, lcdwiki MSP1541), SPI 8-pin header (GND VCC SCL SDA RES DC CS BLK), 32x43.7mm board, four 2.0mm holes.
dimensions_source: lcdwiki MSP1541 drawing+manual: board 32x43.72, holes D2.0 (x +/-13.86, y +/-19.36), 8-pin 2.54 header row 1.5 from top (pin1 7.11 from left), glass 31.52x35.1, AA 27.72 sq centered (top 6.45).
